description_long: This object is a sleek, military-style jet airplane with a long, pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted and straight, with prominent horizontal stabilizers and a single vertical tail fin at the rear. The exterior is primarily gray with French Air Force roundels and a tricolor fin flash, as well as the marking '12-YF' on the tail section. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark canopy. The landing gear is visible and consists of a nose wheel and main gear under the wings, suggesting a tricycle configuration. The overall design is aerodynamic, with minimal surface protrusions and a focus on high-speed performance.
description: A gray, military-style jet airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a pointed nose, and French Air Force markings. It features a single vertical tail fin, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, pointed nose, mid-mounted wings, and tail markings.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the straight wing configuration, tail fin, and overall planform shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the roundel and tail code.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the landing gear arrangement and the underside of the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
